CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-15-2011 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Elizabeth MacDonald, Esq., appearing specially for Plaintiff. Notice having been given and there being no appearance by the defendant, nor an objection filed and no objection by appearing counsel. The court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. Proceedings not reported. (610)
